docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,540.58 FILED BY YU, JI AS TO DEFENDANT AMBROCIO ENRIQUEZ, LESLY PATRICIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-10-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE ($50.00) SERVED OCT-29-2025, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, NO SERVICE FEE AS TO PLAINTIFF YU, JI

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YU, JI IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT AMBROCIO ENRIQUEZ, LESLY PATRICIA PLAINTIFF FAILED TO MEET HER BURDEN OF PROOF THAT DEFENDANT WAS LIABLE FOR THE COLLISION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
STIPULATION TO USE A PRO TEM JUDGE FILED BY YU, JI AMBROCIO ENRIQUEZ, LESLY PATRICIA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-10-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-10-2025 BY JUDGE PRO TEM LAURA KRAMER SUJEETH. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF JI YU IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LESLY PATRICIA AMBROCIO ENRIQUEZ IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-10-2025 - JUDGMENT.
